## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy feedback and align on next steps for HyperExponential's SEO and content marketing approach.](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus 70% on editorial content, 30% on broader strategy (non-branded site, thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Prioritize AI-related content clusters, especially around commercial P\&C insurance](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Keyword research reveals significant whitespace opportunity vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Next steps: Refine content clusters, conduct deeper keyword research, regroup Friday](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - ["Comprehensive AI platform" not an accurate framing; focus on specific solution areas:](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
    1.  Submission ingestion & triage
    2.  Pricing & underwriting (HX's core strength)
    3.  Portfolio optimization
  - [Underwriting workbench emerging as a known category (e.g., SEND, Federado)](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [AI transformation a key high-level topic, but consider traffic potential carefully](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Pricing transformation less used in U.S. market](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Keyword Research Insights

  - [AI-related keywords likely underreported in tools due to rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Many AI topics have low difficulty, presenting opportunities to rank well](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Competitor analysis:](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Sierra: 11,000 keywords (broad focus beyond insurance)](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [Earnix: 1,300 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
      - [Indico: 1,400 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [Federado: \~500 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [HX: \~100 keywords (significant growth potential)](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

### Content Prioritization

  - [Top of funnel: Market intelligence, AI transformation](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Middle/bottom funnel: Guides, comparison content, data submission/ingestion for P\&C](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Avoid deep technical content (e.g., Excel tutorials) initially due to resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Focus on AI-related content clusters first, then expand based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

### Target Personas

  - [Newer personas (e.g., Cycle) best suited for initial content focus](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Actuaries (core persona) potentially for deeper, second-phase content](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida/team to refine content clusters based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Conduct deeper keyword research, focusing on AI-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Prepare content ideas and recommendations for Friday meeting (10:00 AM ET)](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Erik to source relevant slides from sales deck for David's company presentation](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Regroup on Friday to review keyword research findings and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VUgzpx6sm29KRo8E28kPQF6x-3ByaCLw?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
